entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The crop species being evaluated for sugar content across various cultivars.

entities.name: TOTAL SUGAR CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of sugar present in the stalks, grains, and juice of sorghum cultivars.

entities.name: STALKS
entities.description: The stem part of the sorghum plant used for sugar and juice analysis.

entities.name: GRAINS
entities.description: The seed part of the sorghum plant used for sugar analysis.

entities.name: WORLD GERMPLASM COLLECTION
entities.description: The global repository of genetic resources from which sorghum cultivars were selected.

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, which maintains the germplasm collection.

entities.name: PHYSIOLOGICAL MATURITY
entities.description: The developmental stage of the plant at which stalks were harvested for analysis.

entities.name: JUICINESS
entities.description: The quantity of juice extracted from the sorghum stalks.

entities.name: JUICE
entities.description: The liquid extracted from sorghum stalks to measure sugar content.
